glosses.ja: 閉じ込める; 監禁する

sentences.target: J'enferme le chat dans la chambre.

translations.fr: J'enferme le chat dans la chambre.
translations.en: I'm locking the cat in the bedroom.
translations.es: Estoy encerrando al gato en el dormitorio.
translations.de: Ich sperre die Katze im Schlafzimmer ein.
translations.it: Chiudo il gatto a chiave in camera da letto.
translations.yue: 我將隻貓鎖喺睡房入面。
translations.pt: Estou trancando o gato no quarto.
translations.he: אני נועל את החתול בחדר השינה.
translations.vi: Tôi đang nhốt con mèo trong phòng ngủ.
translations.ar: أنا أحبس القط في غرفة النوم.
translations.nl: Ik sluit de kat op in de slaapkamer.
translations.hi: मैं बिल्ली को बेडरूम में बंद कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg låser katten inne på soverommet.
translations.id: Saya mengunci kucing di kamar tidur.
translations.sv: Jag låser in katten i sovrummet.
translations.da: Jeg låser katten inde i soveværelset.
translations.ja: 猫を寝室に閉じ込めています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject clitic pronoun, elided before a vowel-initial verb; subject of the sentence.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of the verb ‘enfermer’; main predicate.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for ‘chat’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘enferme’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for ‘chambre’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘dans’ (locative).

sentences.target: On va enfermer les bijoux dans le coffre.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ va ɑ̃fɛʁme le biʒu dɑ̃ lə kɔfʁ/

translations.fr: On va enfermer les bijoux dans le coffre.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ va ɑ̃fɛʁme le biʒu dɑ̃ lə kɔfʁ/
translations.en: We're going to lock the jewelry in the safe.
translations.es: Vamos a guardar las joyas en la caja fuerte.
translations.de: Wir werden den Schmuck im Safe einschließen.
translations.ko: 우리는 보석을 금고에 넣어 잠글 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要把首饰锁进保险箱里。
translations.yue: 我哋會將啲首飾鎖入保險箱入面。
translations.ru: Мы собираемся запереть украшения в сейфе.
translations.pt: Vamos trancar as joias no cofre.
translations.he: אנחנו הולכים לנעול את התכשיטים בכספת.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ khóa trang sức trong két sắt.
translations.nl: We sluiten de sieraden op in de kluis.
translations.uk: Ми збираємося замкнути прикраси в сейфі.
translations.hu: Be fogjuk zárni az ékszereket a széfbe.
translations.hi: हम गहनों को तिजोरी में बंद करने वाले हैं.
translations.el: Θα κλειδώσουμε τα κοσμήματα στο χρηματοκιβώτιο.
translations.nb: Vi skal låse inn smykkene i safen.
translations.id: Kami akan mengunci perhiasan di brankas.
translations.sv: Vi ska låsa in smyckena i kassaskåpet.
translations.da: Vi låser smykkerne inde i pengeskabet.
translations.ja: 宝石を金庫に入れて施錠します。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; here colloquially ‘we/people’.
Auxiliary ‘aller’ in present, 3rd person singular; forms near future with an infinitive.
Infinitive verb; complement of the auxiliary ‘va’ indicating the action.
Definite article, plural; determiner for ‘bijoux’.
Common noun, plural; direct object of ‘enfermer’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for ‘coffre’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘dans’ (location).

sentences.target: Tu t'enfermes dans la salle de bains.
sentences.reading: /ty t‿ɑ̃fɛʁm dɑ̃ la sal də bɛ̃/

translations.fr: Tu t'enfermes dans la salle de bains.
translations.ipa: /ty t‿ɑ̃fɛʁm dɑ̃ la sal də bɛ̃/
translations.en: You’re locking yourself in the bathroom.
translations.de: Du schließt dich im Badezimmer ein.
translations.it: Ti chiudi a chiave in bagno.
translations.zh-Hans: 你把自己反锁在浴室里。
translations.yue: 你喺浴室度反鎖咗自己。
translations.pt: Você está se trancando no banheiro.
translations.he: אתה נועל את עצמך בחדר האמבטיה.
translations.vi: Bạn đang tự nhốt mình trong phòng tắm.
translations.nl: Je sluit jezelf op in de badkamer.
translations.hi: तुम खुद को बाथरूम में बंद कर रहे हो.
translations.nb: Du låser deg inne på badet.
translations.id: Kamu mengunci diri di kamar mandi.
translations.sv: Du låser in dig i badrummet.
translations.da: Du låser dig inde på badeværelset.
translations.ja: 君は浴室に閉じこもっている。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
2nd person singular reflexive clitic pronoun, elided before a vowel; pronominal object of the verb.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular of ‘enfermer’; pronominal (reflexive) use with ‘t’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for ‘salle’.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the NP ‘salle de bains’ and object of ‘dans’.
Preposition linking ‘salle’ to ‘bains’ to form a compound noun.
Common noun, plural; complement of the preposition ‘de’.

sentences.target: Nous enfermons les vélos dans le garage.
sentences.reading: /nu ɑ̃fɛʁmɔ̃ le velo dɑ̃ lə gaʁaʒ/

translations.fr: Nous enfermons les vélos dans le garage.
translations.ipa: /nu ɑ̃fɛʁmɔ̃ le velo dɑ̃ lə gaʁaʒ/
translations.en: We lock the bikes in the garage.
translations.es: Encerramos las bicicletas en el garaje.
translations.de: Wir schließen die Fahrräder in der Garage ein.
translations.it: Chiudiamo le biciclette in garage a chiave.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把自行车锁在车库里。
translations.yue: 我哋將單車鎖喺車庫入面。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi khóa xe đạp trong gara.
translations.nl: We sluiten de fietsen op in de garage.
translations.hi: हम साइकिलों को गैराज में बंद करते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi låser inn syklene i garasjen.
translations.sv: Vi låser in cyklarna i garaget.
translations.da: Vi låser cyklerne inde i garagen.
translations.ja: 自転車をガレージに入れて施錠します。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 1st person plural of ‘enfermer’; main predicate.
Definite article, plural; determiner for ‘vélos’.
Common noun, plural; direct object of ‘enfermons’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for ‘garage’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘dans’.
